phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: At level 1 the numbers lean your way — laser zone control edge out the wall-frost poke control when both sides play it straight. Press the small advantages: wave position, first poke, cooldown ticks.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: Slight edge at level 2: your laser zone control beat Anivia's wall-frost poke control on the margins. Take the short trades you start — just don't force a coin-flip all-in off a small lead.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: At level 3 your laser zone control beat the wall-frost poke control in a straight exchange. Play the front foot — make Anivia answer you, not the other way around.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Your laser zone control out-muscle Anivia's wall-frost poke control through levels 4-5 — this window is yours, so force the trades and tax every step toward the wave.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Chaos Storm online — your all-in answer and teamfight entry. In lane it's the kill: W-E-R on anyone who oversteps.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: the laser chunks a third bar and the storm executes the remainder. Force extended rotations.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Evolved late-game Viktor is a zone the enemy can't enter: W the choke, E the clump, and steer R through the retreat.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q-shield trades on his last-hits — the empowered auto walk-away is sneakily one of the better level-1 trades mid.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: E online: the laser farms AND pokes in one cast. Aim it through minions into his chest on every wave contact.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W zones his aggression and the E-Q-auto trade pattern is fully armed. Stack your first augment quietly.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Lost Chapter timing — laser every wave contact and bank Manaflow. Each augment makes the same spells quietly crueler.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Chaos Storm online — your all-in answer and teamfight entry. In lane it's the kill: W-E-R on anyone who oversteps.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Luden's spike: the laser chunks a third bar and the storm executes the remainder. Force extended rotations.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Evolved late-game Viktor is a zone the enemy can't enter: W the choke, E the clump, and steer R through the retreat.
